records.m_Talk_DEU: Yup! No problem here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yup! No problem here!

records.m_Talk_FRA: We came to help... a little.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll support you from behind, so fight to your heart's content.

records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll support you from behind, so fight to your heart's content.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, you all worry too much.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course!

records.m_Talk_DEU: We're always ready!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're always ready!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! It's all thanks to my excellent skills, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! It's all thanks to my excellent skills, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! It's all thanks to my excellent skills, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The monsters ahead are very powerful, so don't let your guard down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The monsters ahead are very powerful, so don't let your guard down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The monsters ahead are very powerful, so don't let your guard down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We came to help... a little.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We came to help... a little.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We came to help... a little.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll support you from behind, so fight to your heart's content.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll support you from behind, so fight to your heart's content.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll support you from behind, so fight to your heart's content.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, you all worry too much.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, you all worry too much.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, you all worry too much.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just so you know, don't you dare use your assistance as an excuse to try and steal my spotlight, okay?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just so you know, don't you dare use your assistance as an excuse to try and steal my spotlight, okay?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just so you know, don't you dare use your assistance as an excuse to try and steal my spotlight, okay?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry... We'll just stand back and watch.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry... We'll just stand back and watch.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry... We'll just stand back and watch.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, girls. Are you all ready?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, girls. Are you all ready?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, girls. Are you all ready?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're always ready!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're always ready!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're always ready!

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm a little scared, but... I think I can do it since our teachers have our backs!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm a little scared, but... I think I can do it since our teachers have our backs!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm a little scared, but... I think I can do it since our teachers have our backs!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There it is!
root.m_Talk_DEU: There it is!
root.m_Talk_FRA: There it is!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa! It's huge!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa! It's huge!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa! It's huge!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-are you sure about this...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-are you sure about this...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-are you sure about this...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If not, are you going to run away?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If not, are you going to run away?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If not, are you going to run away?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You all remember your roles, right? Then, I'll go in first!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You all remember your roles, right? Then, I'll go in first!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You all remember your roles, right? Then, I'll go in first!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can do it... as a team.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can do it... as a team.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can do it... as a team.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. Everyone, stay in your positions.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. Everyone, stay in your positions.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. Everyone, stay in your positions.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's do this!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's do this!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's do this!
